title: orchis pauciflora
intro: Orchis pauciflora, also known as the narrow-leaved green orchid or green orchid, is a type of orchid species native to various parts of the world. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Orchis pauciflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. The herbal preparations of Orchis pauciflora include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or used in the treatment of various health conditions.
